caption: A man with a grey, spiky wig, glasses, and a white collared shirt with a red and white bow tie sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, a wall is covered with numerous framed photographs and items of clothing on mannequins. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears on the screen. In the background, a yellow sign with the word "LEE" is partially visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position and continues speaking, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he delivers his words. The camera angle and lighting remain constant, capturing his profile as he interacts with the recording equipment.
